cannot_determine: This is an educational presentation about ergonomics in surgery, not an FLS/MISTELS performance video

demonstrated_techniques: proper ergonomic positioning for laparoscopic surgery
verbal_cues: monitors should be 10-30 degrees below eye level
table height at 70-80% of surgeons' elbow height
working angle between instruments should be ~60 degrees
micro-pauses of 20s every 20min reduce fatigue and errors
caregivers should not stand >2 hours continuously without fatigue-reducing interventions
common_errors_addressed: improper monitor positioning leading to neck strain
inadequate table height causing back strain
not incorporating stretching into surgical routine

confidence_rationale: This is clearly an educational presentation slide deck about surgical ergonomics, not an FLS task performance. The content focuses on work-related musculoskeletal disorders (WMSD) prevention in surgery.
